headline: Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) Gets A Wells Fargo Upgrade, Is It Still 5% Undervalued?
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) is back in focus after Wells Fargo upgraded the stock to Overweight, highlighting demand for its high capacity storage products tied to cloud and AI infrastructure spending. See our latest analysis for Seagate Technology Holdings. The Wells Fargo upgrade lands after a strong run for Seagate Technology Holdings, with the share price up 11.0% over the past week and 77.4% over 90 days. headline: SK Hynix Joins the Nasdaq. But This Nasdaq-100 Semiconductor Stock Could Be an Even Better Buy for the Second Half of 2026.
summary: ASML's lithography machines are needed to manufacture advanced logic and memory chips for AI workflows.
